prompt: A traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting a lone traveler descending a winding mountain path step by step from a high peak into a calm valley below. The composition uses strong asymmetry, with the mountain dominating one side and open space on the other. The scene includes stylized clouds and flowing shapes inspired by Edo-period prints. The traveler’s repeated downward movement visually suggests gradual progress toward the lowest point. Rendered in flat, unshaded colors with bold black outlines, limited palette of indigo, muted green, beige, and soft earth tones. Visible woodblock texture, minimal perspective depth, no modern elements, no text.
tradition_approach: Used flat colors, bold outlines, asymmetrical composition, stylized clouds, limited palette, and woodblock texture to match Ukiyo-e visual grammar while mapping descent to optimization.
